name: design-markdown-hard-gate
title: Decide and implement the DESIGN.md hard-gate policy
description: Resolve whether invalid generated DESIGN.md must block Outcome when valid imported documentation exists, then implement the chosen policy consistently.
creator: tseka
notes: Current shipped policy preserves valid visual media, exposes generated docs as repair-required, and accepts valid imported DESIGN.md as outcome evidence. A hard gate would intentionally change that recovery contract.
